title: Transfer of Shares of Stocks. An LMA operating as a corporation shall
content: 14 notify in writing the Department of any transfer of shares of stocks of the corporation within 15 thirty (30) calendar days from approval of such transfer by SEC and submit the 16 documentary requirements prescribed by the Department. 17 18
